scripts.build: npm --workspace @las/shared run build && npm --workspace @las/scheduler run build && npm --workspace @las/api run build
scripts.dev: npm --workspace @las/shared run build && npm --workspace @las/scheduler run build && npm --workspace @las/api run dev
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace @las/shared run typecheck && npm --workspace @las/scheduler run typecheck && npm --workspace @las/api run typecheck
